# User Story 1: Register Passkey (Admin Self-Service)

As a verified Classroom Admin, I want to register a passkey for my account so that I can log in passwordless in the future.

## Parent Feature
- Part of Feature: Passkey-Based Authentication

## Acceptance Criteria
1. The user can initiate passkey registration from their settings panel.
2. The system triggers browser WebAuthn API (`navigator.credentials.create`) with a challenge generated by the backend.
3. Upon successful device authenticator enrollment, the public key credential is encrypted/saved securely in the database under the user's account.
4. The user is prompted to label their passkey (e.g. "My MacBook Pro").
5. The system generates and displays a 4-word xkcd passphrase and stores its PBKDF2/SHA-256 hash in Firestore.

## Gherkin BDD Scenario
```gherkin
  Scenario: Register a new Passkey and Backup Passphrase
    Given an Admin is authenticated via email link
    When the Admin registers a new passkey named "My Laptop"
    Then the system generates a 4-word backup passphrase
    And the passkey and hashed backup passphrase are saved to the profile
```
